Document:
# Rule 1: Griefing Griefing is the act of one player intentionally harming or disrupting the experience of other players without a valid roleplay reason. If an administrator believes a player intends to cause harm, action may be taken regardless of stated intent. Any damage caused by griefing may be reversed at an administrator's discretion.
## End-of-Round Griefing - Griefing after the round has ended, such as shooting friendly players, can result in an immediate ban of up to 4 hours without warning. - This includes suicide at the end of a round for no good RP reason and for no reason shooting and throwing grenades.
